title: Fire's Reflamed
description: Fire's Reflamed is pretty much the same mod as the original, just with "a new coat of paint" if you will. (even a few new features)
body:
# Welcome Back To Fire's Tool Workshop Reflamed!

This mod is practically the same as the original, just with a fresh coat of paint. I know that the original FTW mod didn't receive many updates, but that will hopefully change with this one. Although I still won't have a consistent schedule, but I do hope to add more things.

FTW Reflamed currently has a material list of:

- Titanium
- Steel
- Ruby
- Aquamarine
- Willow Wood Type

I still suggest using [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) or [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) to learn recipes.

With that being said, I hope you enjoy your stay at Fire's Tool Workshop!
